changeList: 2.1.215-1-5987fbf: PR #124 - Merge Coomer/OnlyFans outputs into originating Reddit rip folder (https://github.com/Laziassdev/ripme/pull/124) — ### Motivation - When a Reddit rip spawns a Coomer/OnlyFans rip the downloaded files were left in a separate folder which caused duplicate downstream processing (for example duplicate LoRA generation).
